---
title: "test_intent.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_intent.py"
loc: 33
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.52
style_score: 3.88
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.69
---

## Intent
The `test_intent.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestIntentImmutability, test_immutability_breach_raises_typeerror, TestSovereignAnchorPrecision, test_lexical_anchor_overrides_semantic_bias. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestIntentImmutability, test_immutability_breach_raises_typeerror, TestSovereignAnchorPrecision, test_lexical_anchor_overrides_semantic_bias. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 9 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [types](file://types)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)
- [src.core.payload](file://src.core.payload)

### Exports
- `TestIntentImmutability`
- `test_immutability_breach_raises_typeerror`
- `TestSovereignAnchorPrecision`
- `test_lexical_anchor_overrides_semantic_bias`
